revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀の医師}} {{commons cat multi|8th-century physicians}} [[8世紀]]の[[医師]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:いし…」
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[ja:Category:8世紀の医師]] [[ar:Category:أطباء القرن 8]] [[es:Category:Médicos del siglo VIII]] [[fa:Category:پزشکان سده ۸ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Médecin du VIIIe siècle]] [[it:Category:Medici dell'VIII secolo]] [[ru:Category:Медики VIII века]] [[tr:Category:8. yüzyıl hekimleri]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:8世紀日本の医師]].

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀の医師}} {{commons cat multi|8th-century physicians}} [[8世紀]] (8世紀生、または8世紀没)の[[医師]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{see also|en:Category:8th-century physicians}}
{{デフォルトソート:いし}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:8世紀の医師]]|version=87438975}} [[ja:Category:8世紀の医師]]
